productDisplayName: Nike Unisex Triplefin Tho Flip Flop
description: Sheek and stylish, the nike Triplefin thong is a great casual flip flop. Designed for comfort and style, this footwear piece comes with ample cushioning that provides all-day comfortUpper Synthetic leather straps with fabric lining inside for durability and comfort cushioning for the foot Perforated straps for enhanced dry comfort Wide, synthetic twill toe separator for added comfort and durability Midsole EVA cushioned footbed for all-day comfort Outsole Durable rubber outsole with rectangular lugs in the forefoot and rearfoot, coupled with diamond-shaped small grooves in the forefoot medial side and rearfoot lateral side for enhnaced traction and stability Wash careDo not machine washRemove dust and dirt with dry clean cloth
